languages.text: [Обратиться к оперируемому] "Я слыша{mf|л|ла}, что хорошая история может притупить боль. Хочешь, расскажу тебе о своих приключениях? Однажды..."
[Address the patient] "I have heard that a good story can dull the pain. Would you like me to tell you about my adventures? On one occasion..."
languages.original_text: [Обратиться к оперируемому] "Я слыша{mf|л|ла}, что хорошая история может притупить боль. Хочешь, расскажу тебе о своих приключениях? Однажды..."

traits.locale_text: [Address the patient] "I have heard that a good story can dull the pain. Would you like me to tell you about my adventures? On one occasion..."

[Address the patient] "I have heard that a good story can dull the pain. Would you like me to tell you about my adventures? On one occasion..."

languages.text: [Den Patienten ansprechen] "Ich habe gehört, eine gute Geschichte kann den Schmerz lindern. Soll ich Euch von meinen Abenteuern erzählen? Einmal habe ich ..."
languages.original_text: [Address the patient] "I have heard that a good story can dull the pain. Would you like me to tell you about my adventures? On one occasion..."

traits.locale_text: [Den Patienten ansprechen] "Ich habe gehört, eine gute Geschichte kann den Schmerz lindern. Soll ich Euch von meinen Abenteuern erzählen? Einmal habe ich ..."

languages.text: [Vous adresser au patient] « J'ai entendu dire qu'une bonne histoire pouvait atténuer la douleur. Voulez-vous que je vous parle de mes aventures ? Un jour... »
languages.original_text: [Address the patient] "I have heard that a good story can dull the pain. Would you like me to tell you about my adventures? On one occasion..."

traits.locale_text: [Vous adresser au patient] « J'ai entendu dire qu'une bonne histoire pouvait atténuer la douleur. Voulez-vous que je vous parle de mes aventures ? Un jour... »

languages.text: 【对病人说】“我听说，好故事能减轻疼痛。你想听听我的冒险经历吗？有一次……”
languages.original_text: [Address the patient] "I have heard that a good story can dull the pain. Would you like me to tell you about my adventures? On one occasion..."

traits.locale_text: 【对病人说】“我听说，好故事能减轻疼痛。你想听听我的冒险经历吗？有一次……”

languages.text: [Dirigirte al paciente] «Tengo entendido que una buena historia puede calmar el dolor. ¿Quiere que le cuente mis aventuras? En una ocasión...».
languages.original_text: [Address the patient] "I have heard that a good story can dull the pain. Would you like me to tell you about my adventures? On one occasion..."

traits.locale_text: [Dirigirte al paciente] «Tengo entendido que una buena historia puede calmar el dolor. ¿Quiere que le cuente mis aventuras? En una ocasión...».

languages.text: [手術を受けている人に向かって]「いい話は痛みを和らげると聞いたことがあります。私の冒険をお話ししましょうか？昔々...」
languages.original_text: [Address the patient] "I have heard that a good story can dull the pain. Would you like me to tell you about my adventures? On one occasion..."

traits.locale_text: [手術を受けている人に向かって]「いい話は痛みを和らげると聞いたことがあります。私の冒険をお話ししましょうか？昔々...」

languages.text: [Hastaya seslen] "İyi bir hikâyenin acıyı hafifletebileceğini duymuştum. Sana maceralarımdan bahsetmemi ister misin? Bir keresinde..."
languages.original_text: [Address the patient] "I have heard that a good story can dull the pain. Would you like me to tell you about my adventures? On one occasion..."
